subject: Magikarp — orange fish creature leaping out of water on a sunny beach, with a small yellow creature visible in the background
description: An orange fish creature leaps from the water in a bright beach setting, mouth open wide, scales catching the light. The water and sand behind it are sunny and summery, with a small yellow round creature visible in the background on the beach — visually consistent with Pikachu but identified only as a suspected IP figure. The mood is joyful and a bit goofy. The palette is warm oranges, sandy yellows, and aqua blues.
foreground: orange fish creature leaping from water
background: sunny beach with water and sand, small yellow creature in distance
